evals.prompt: Is DevHunt worth submitting to for SEO backlinks? How does it compare?
evals.expected_output: Explains DevHunt offers free dofollow backlinks at DR57-62, which is strong mid-to-high range. Compares with Open Launch (DR65), MicroLaunch (DR59), SoloPush (DR46). Notes developer-only audience as unique differentiator.

assertions.name: dr_value
assertions.description: States DevHunt DR is in the 57-62 range with dofollow backlink

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares DevHunt backlink value with at least one other directory like Open Launch (DR65) or MicroLaunch (DR59)

assertions.name: developer_audience
assertions.description: Notes the developer-only audience or GitHub authentication as a unique differentiator

evals.prompt: Should I pay $49 for DevHunt featured placement or use that budget elsewhere?
evals.expected_output: Explains the $49 featured placement gets promoted visibility. Compares with cheaper alternatives: Open Launch Premium ($12 for DR65 dofollow) and OpenHunts Premium ($9.90 for DR50). Recommends paying only if product specifically targets developers.

assertions.name: featured_cost
assertions.description: States the $49 featured placement cost and what it offers

assertions.name: cheaper_alternatives
assertions.description: Recommends cheaper alternatives like Open Launch ($12) or OpenHunts ($9.90) for guaranteed backlinks

assertions.name: developer_fit
assertions.description: Notes that $49 is worth it primarily if the product targets developers specifically

evals.prompt: How do I submit my developer tool to DevHunt?
evals.expected_output: Walks through submission: sign in via GitHub, click Submit your Dev Tool, fill out form with logo/tagline/description/screenshots/category, choose free or $49 featured, engage with community after launch.

assertions.name: github_auth
assertions.description: Mentions GitHub authentication is required to submit

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Describes the submission form including product details, category selection, and screenshots

assertions.name: free_vs_paid
assertions.description: Mentions the choice between free submission and $49 featured placement
